title: Cobblemon Duskit
description: Datapack for cobblemon that adds Duskit from the hit game Loomian Legacy.
body:
![Duskit!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ccbfb6b8eff93cb230a57552ac51c33e6f0d23f.png)

Datapack for cobblemon that adds Duskit from the hit game Loomian Legacy.

![Spawns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c9fc0eddc864b8fe019b92ec850f025850376b8.png)

![Stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e61027ea6f4cf8f3a1d58cdb8837103d218dd8e0.png)

Ability: Synchronize
Hidden Ability: Guts

![Forms Explained](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e01c983b923ed8f2d78a2b43874ef3327c5a012.png)
